T01 Draft business case (5d)
A: CEO

T02 GATE 1
Business Case Approval (3d)
A: CEO

span.p:
T04 Create L1 Requirement (7d)
incl. BOM cost + margin envelope
A: CEO

A: CEO

min 3 quoted

PARALLEL

T13 GATE 4

DESIGN FREEZE
A: CEO

Kill / documented stop
reason + sunk cost recorded
